title: NDLEA Decorates New Assistant Commandants General Of Narcotics - FinancialEDGE
description: Photos Caption : Chairman/Chief Executive Officer of the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA), Brig. Gen. Mohamed Buba Marwa (Rtd) CON, OFR, decorated three newly promoted Assistant Commanders General of Narcotics, ACGNs and other officers in the Chairman/CEO’s office while he was assisted by the Agency Secretary Barr. Shadrach Haruna, some Directors and family members
html: Photos Caption : Chairman/Chief Executive Officer of the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA), Brig. Gen. Mohamed Buba Marwa (Rtd) CON, OFR, decorated three newly promoted Assistant Commanders General of Narcotics, ACGNs and other officers in the Chairman/CEO’s office while he was assisted by the Agency Secretary Barr. Shadrach Haruna, some Directors and family members of the affected officers at the NDLEA National Headquarters, Abuja on Monday, 12th January 2026
